case_title: BRAVO, JOSEPH K. et al vs. LIPSHULTZ, NATHAN et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAVO, JOSEPH K. BRAVO & MARGULIES AS TO DEFENDANT LIPSHULTZ, NATHAN LIPSHULTZ, SUSAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-02-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-14-1994

NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FROM BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO REQUEST FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED BY BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO PER REQUEST OF SUSAN AND NATHAN LIPSCHULTZ FILED BY DEFENDANT LIPSHULTZ, NATHAN

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-02-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-02-1995, TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DSIMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-17-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-17-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-16-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUL-17-1995 TO AUG-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-02-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR RESULT OF BASF ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
